github.description: GitHub operations — PRs, issues, repos, code search

context7.description: Live documentation lookup for libraries and frameworks

_comments.usage: Copy this file to your project root as .mcp.json
_comments.setup: Replace YOUR_GITHUB_PAT_HERE with your actual GitHub PAT
_comments.context_warning: Keep under 10 MCPs enabled to preserve context window (200k → ~70k with too many)
